executive_summary: ProductOS is building the operating system for AI-powered product management. PMs spend 60% of their week on manual compilation — competitive research, documentation, strategy decks, status updates. ProductOS automates this autonomously, generating world-class PM artifacts (PESTLE analysis, interactive prototypes, PRDs, marketing content) from messy research inputs. The PM tooling market is $2.8B growing 35% CAGR. No competitor offers the combination of strategy depth, prototype generation, and autonomous living system that ProductOS brings. We are raising $1.5M Seed to complete V10 development and launch with enterprise compliance features, targeting $500K ARR within 12 months.

sections.title: Problem
sections.content: Product Managers at companies of all sizes spend 15+ hours per week on manual compilation tasks — competitive research, documentation, status updates, strategy deck creation. Existing AI PM tools produce generic outputs requiring 40%+ manual rewrite. No tool covers the full PM lifecycle from environmental analysis through prototype generation through marketing content. PMs are stuck choosing between manual excellence (slow) and AI assistance (shallow).
key_claims: PMs spend 60% of workweek on manual tasks
AI PM tools have 40%+ rewrite rate
No competitor offers PESTLE, decision intelligence, or autonomous prototypes

sections.title: Solution
sections.content: ProductOS V10 is the first AI PM tool that covers the complete product lifecycle autonomously. Drop in messy research inputs (interview notes, competitor data, market reports). The system generates: McKinsey-quality PESTLE analysis with 3-horizon projections, evidence-backed persona synthesis with empathy maps, end-to-end customer journey maps with emotion curves, 3 interactive HTML prototype variants with WCAG accessibility, decision intelligence (trade-off analysis, decision trees, sensitivity, premortems), developer-ready PRDs and user stories, complete marketing content packs. A living system monitors all artifacts for staleness, drift, and auto-refreshes when underlying data changes. A Product Health Dashboard surfaces the top 5 actions the PM should take today.
key_claims: Covers 100% of PM lifecycle vs 40-60% for competitors
Output quality target: <20% rewrite rate (vs 40%+ for competitors)
10+ unique capabilities no competitor offers

sections.title: Market Opportunity
sections.content: The PM tooling market is .8B in 2026, growing at 35% CAGR. AI-native PM tools are capturing disproportionate share of new spend — 2x faster growth than general PM SaaS. Enterprise PM teams represent .2B addressable market. Startup segment (M) is currently budget-constrained but represents future growth as AI PM tooling becomes standard.
key_claims: .8B market, 35% CAGR
.2B enterprise PM addressable
AI-native PM tools growing 2x faster than category

sections.title: Competitive Advantage
sections.content: ProductOS offers 10+ capabilities no competitor has: PESTLE environmental analysis, autonomous decision intelligence, AI prototype generation with WCAG accessibility, living system auto-refresh, autonomous review gates f(confidence, impact, maturity), and complete marketing content generation. The regulatory complexity of AI (EU AI Act, emerging US regulation) creates a moat — ProductOS is designed compliance-first with AI transparency labels, evidence traceability, and PM review gates.
key_claims: 10+ unique capabilities vs 2-3 for competitors
Regulatory moat — compliance-first design
Living system — competitors generate static outputs

sections.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
sections.content: Product-led growth with 14-day free trial. Target enterprise PM teams through Jira and Confluence integration depth. Community-led adoption through PM Slack communities, G2 reviews, and beta tester advocacy. Content marketing engine: auto-generated blog posts, case studies, and competitive battle cards.
key_claims: PLG + enterprise sales hybrid model
Jira/Confluence integration as primary acquisition channel
Content marketing auto-generation reduces GTM costs

sections.title: Traction and Team
sections.content: V10 beta: 10 PM testers. 8/10 would recommend. Average time savings: 10+ hrs/week. Output quality: 85% parity with manual PM work. Team: 4 engineers, 1 PM, experienced in AI agent tooling and PM workflow optimization.
key_claims: 10 beta testers, 80% recommend rate
10+ hrs/week time savings per PM
4 engineers + 1 PM team

sections.title: Use of Funds
sections.content: .5M Seed allocated: 60% engineering (4 engineers × 12 months), 20% GTM (initial sales hire, content marketing), 10% infrastructure (LLM API costs, hosting), 10% compliance and legal (SOC2, EU AI Act compliance, GDPR). Runway: 18 months. Milestone: K ARR within 12 months.
key_claims: 60% engineering, 20% GTM
18-month runway
K ARR target within 12 months

sections.title: Key Risks
sections.content: Competitive risk: CompetitorAlpha has 10x user base and launched AI PRD generation. Mitigation: differentiation on full PM lifecycle (not just PRD). Regulatory risk: EU AI Act may expand high-risk classification to autonomous decision tools. Mitigation: built-in PM review gates and AI transparency labels. Adoption risk: PMs may resist AI augmentation. Mitigation: positioning as augmentation, not replacement; beta tester advocacy.
key_claims: Competitive: 10x smaller user base — mitigated by feature depth
Regulatory: EU AI Act — mitigated by compliance-first design
Adoption: PM resistance — mitigated by augmentation positioning
